title: INSTALL DESIGNER
body: Designer is a thick client that connects to your gateway for development. Download the launcher from the gateway top-menu.
code:
Designer Launcher:
  Download from: http://localhost:8088
  Top menu → "Get Designer"
  Install the .exe/.dmg/.deb

First launch:
  Add Gateway:
    URL:  http://localhost:8088
    User: admin
    Pass: [admin password]

  Click "Open Designer"
  Select your project (or create new)
key: Designer connects TO the gateway — not standalone
Updates auto when the gateway updates
mistakes: Trying to "install" projects — they live on the gateway
